sectionTitle: How to Have a Healthy Diet?

samples.pinyin: xīn chǎnpǐn hěn shòu huānyíng.
samples.en: The new product is very popular.
samples.vi: Sản phẩm mới rất được yêu thích.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen tuīchūle xīn chǎnpǐn.
samples.en: We have launched a new product.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi đã ra mắt sản phẩm mới.

samples.meaning: open; be on; turn on; switch on
samples.pinyin: tā qīng qīng de kāile chōutì.
samples.en: She gently opened the drawer.
samples.vi: Cô ấy nhẹ nhàng mở ngăn kéo.

samples.meaning: open; be on; turn on; switch on
samples.pinyin: tā kāile diànshì kàn xīnwén.
samples.en: He turned on the TV to watch the news.
samples.vi: Anh ấy mở TV để xem tin tức.

samples.pinyin: wǒ juédìng kāishǐ sùshí.
samples.en: I have decided to become vegetarian.
samples.vi: Tôi quyết định bắt đầu ăn chay.

samples.pinyin: tāmen quánjiā dōu sùshí.
samples.en: Their whole family is vegetarian.

samples.pinyin: sù shí cháng hányǒu gāo zhīfáng.
samples.en: Fast food often contains high fat.
samples.vi: Đồ ăn nhanh thường chứa nhiều chất béo.

samples.pinyin: jiànkāng zhuānjiā bù tuījiàn sù shí.
samples.en: Health experts don’t recommend fast food.
samples.vi: Chuyên gia sức khỏe không khuyên dùng đồ ăn nhanh.

samples.meaning: be interlocked and jagged; be intricate
samples.sentence: “八公山上，草木皆兵”，是錯覺之一例。
samples.pinyin: "Bā gōng shān shàng, cǎo mù jiē bīng", shì cuò jué zhī yī lì.
samples.en: “To see every bush and tree on Mount Bagong as an enemy soldier” is an example of misconception.

samples.meaning: be interlocked and jagged; be intricate
samples.sentence: 我們通過試錯找到方法。
samples.pinyin: Wǒmen tōngguò shì cuò zhǎodào fāngfǎ.
samples.en: We found a method through trial and error.

samples.pinyin: Chǎo ròu mò hěn xiāng.
samples.en: Fried minced meat is very fragrant.

samples.sentence: 這種肉被宣告不宜食用。
samples.pinyin: zhè zhǒng ròu bèi xuāngào bùyí shíyòng.
samples.en: The meat was condemned as unfit to eat.

items.en: an interjection particle, calling for attention

samples.pinyin: ǎi, wǒ kěyǐ de.
samples.en: Hey, I can do it.
samples.vi: Ừ, tôi có thể.

samples.pinyin: ǎi, wǒ huì lái de.
samples.en: Hey, I will come.
samples.vi: Vâng, tôi sẽ đến.

samples.meaning: give way; give ground; yield; give up; concede
samples.sentence: 教練員讓了小李五個球。
samples.pinyin: Jiàoliànyuán ràng le xiǎo lǐ wǔ ge qiú.
samples.en: The coach conceded Xiao Li five points.

samples.meaning: give way; give ground; yield; give up; concede
samples.pinyin: gōngsī xiàng yuángōng ràngbù yīxiē.
samples.en: The company concedes a little to the employees.

items.en: to be a vegetarian, to eat vegetarian food

samples.sentence: 越來越多的人開始吃/喫素了。
samples.pinyin: yuè lái yuè duō de rén kāishǐ chīsùle.
samples.en: A growing number of people are going vegetarian.

samples.sentence: 他們相信吃/喫素有益健康。
samples.pinyin: tāmen xiāngxìn chīsù yǒuyì jiànkāng.
samples.en: They believe that a vegetarian diet is good for health.

samples.pinyin: tā zhǐ xǐhuān chī hànbǎobāo.
samples.en: She lives on burgers.

samples.pinyin: wǒ shòu bùliǎo hànbǎobāo nà wèi!
samples.en: I can't stand hamburgers!

samples.sentence: 這本書改變了我的生活。
samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū gǎibiànle wǒ de shēnghuó.
samples.en: This book changed my life.

samples.sentence: 時間會讓我們變得成熟。
samples.pinyin: shíjiān huì ràng wǒmen biàn de chéngshú.
samples.en: Time will make us mature.

samples.pinyin: Tā pàng qǐlái le.
samples.en: He’s getting fat. or He’s putting on weight.

samples.pinyin: tā yǒuyī fèn pán de gōngzuò.
samples.en: He has an easy and comfortable job.

samples.pinyin: zhè jiā fànguǎn gōngyìng sùcài.
samples.en: This restaurant serves vegetarian dishes.
samples.vi: Nhà hàng này phục vụ các món ăn chay.

samples.pinyin: tā tèbié xǐhuan zuò sùcài.
samples.en: He especially enjoys cooking vegetarian dishes.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đặc biệt thích nấu món chay.

samples.sentence: 他不愛吃/喫油膩的東西。
samples.pinyin: tā bù ài chī yóunì de dōngxi.
samples.en: He doesn't like eating greasy food.

samples.sentence: 炸雞對我來説太油膩了。
samples.pinyin: zhá jī duì wǒ lái shuō tài yóunìle.
samples.en: The fried chicken is too greasy for me.

samples.sentence: 這件衣服的樣式很漂亮。
samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yīfu de yàngshì hěn piàoliang.
samples.en: The style of this dress is very beautiful.
samples.vi: Kiểu dáng của chiếc áo này rất đẹp.

samples.sentence: 這個桌子的樣子很獨特。
samples.pinyin: zhège zhuōzi de yàngzi hěn dútè.
samples.en: The appearance of this table is very unique.
samples.vi: Cái bàn này có hình dạng rất độc đáo.

samples.sentence: 她對科學實驗非常好奇。
samples.pinyin: tā duì kēxué shíyàn fēicháng hàoqí.
samples.en: She is very curious about scientific experiments.

samples.sentence: 他對外星生命感到好奇。
samples.pinyin: tā duì wàixīng shēngmìng gǎndào hàoqí.
samples.en: He is curious about extraterrestrial life.

samples.pinyin: zhège nǚhái fēicháng cōngmíng.
samples.en: This girl is very smart.

samples.sentence: 她是一個很友善的女孩。
samples.pinyin: tā shì yīgè hěn yǒushàn de nǚhái.
samples.en: She is a very friendly girl.

samples.pinyin: qīngcài bùyào chǎo de tài lǎo.
samples.en: Don't cook the vegetables for too long.
samples.vi: Rau cải xanh đừng xào chín quá.

samples.sentence: 這些都是媽媽買的青菜。
samples.pinyin: zhèxiē dōu shì māma mǎi de qīngcài.
samples.en: These are all the greens my mom bought.
samples.vi: Đây đều là rau cải xanh mẹ mua.

samples.pinyin: xìshòu dexiǎotuǐ
samples.en: Thin shanks

samples.sentence: 他漸漸飲食不進, 骨瘦如柴。
samples.pinyin: Tā jiànjiàn yǐnshí bù jìn, gǔshòurúchái.
samples.en: Gradually he lost his appetite and wasted away till he was nothing but skin and bones.

samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ de shìyǒu.
samples.en: He is my roommate.

samples.pinyin: wǒ hé shìyǒu yīqǐ zuò fàn.
samples.en: My roommate and I cook together.
samples.vi: Tôi nấu ăn cùng với bạn cùng phòng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan tǔdòu hé zhūròu.
samples.en: I like potatoes and pork.
samples.vi: Tôi thích khoai tây và thịt lợn.

samples.sentence: 媽媽今天買了很多豬肉。
samples.pinyin: māma jīntiān mǎile hěnduō zhūròu.
samples.en: Mom bought a lot of pork today.

samples.pinyin: wǒ zhù zài xīfāng de chéngshì.
samples.en: I live in a city in the west.

samples.pinyin: xīfāng wénhuà hěn yǒuqù.
samples.en: Western culture is interesting.

samples.pinyin: tā wánquán huīfùle jiànkāng.
samples.en: He has completely recovered his health.

samples.pinyin: wǒ wánquán liǎojiě tā de yìsi.
samples.en: I completely understand his meaning.

samples.pinyin: cǐ cì gǎigé, bǎi fèi xián jǔ.
samples.en: With this reform, all neglected tasks are resumed.

samples.sentence: 這本書內容豐富，老少鹹宜。
samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū nèiróng fēngfù, lǎoshào xián yí.
samples.en: This book is rich in content and suitable for all ages.

samples.sentence: 這瓶子一灌開水就炸了。
samples.pinyin: zhè píngzi yīguàn kāishǔi jìu zhà le。
samples.en: This bottle broke when I poured boiling water into it.
samples.vi: Cái phích này vừa đổ nước sôi vào đã nổ rồi.

samples.sentence: 氣球炸了，把孩子嚇哭了。
samples.pinyin: qìqiú zhàle, bǎ háizi xià kūle.
samples.en: The balloon burst and scared the child into tears.
samples.vi: Bóng bay phát nổ làm em bé bị dọa sợ.

samples.meaning: provided; if only; so long as
samples.sentence: 隻要你在這兒, 我就放心了。
samples.pinyin: zhǐyào nǐ zài zhèr, wǒ jiù fàngxīnle.
samples.en: As long as you're here, I feel at ease.
samples.vi: Chỉ cần anh ở đây là em yên tâm rồi.

samples.meaning: provided; if only; so long as
samples.sentence: 隻要你有錢，我就嫁給你。
samples.pinyin: zhǐyào nǐ yǒu qián, wǒ jiù jià gěi nǐ.
samples.en: If you have money, I will marry you.

samples.pinyin: tā zǒng shì chídào, zhēn tǎoyàn!
samples.en: He is always late, so annoying!
samples.vi: Anh ấy lúc nào cũng đến muộn, thật đáng ghét!

samples.sentence: 別煩我，這個人討厭死了。
samples.pinyin: bié fán wǒ, zhège rén tǎoyàn sǐle.
samples.en: Don't bother me, this person is super annoying!

samples.pinyin: bùyào wàngjì chī zǎocān ya.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen wǎnshàng huì yīqǐ cān.
samples.en: We will have a meal together in the evening.
samples.vi: Chúng ta sẽ cùng nhau ăn tối.

samples.pinyin: tā duì zōngjiào hěn gǎn xìngqù.
samples.en: She is very interested in religion.
samples.vi: Cô ấy rất có hứng thú với tôn giáo.

samples.pinyin: tā cānyùle zōngjiào huódòng.
samples.en: He participated in religious activities.
samples.vi: Ông tham gia các hoạt động tôn giáo.

samples.pinyin: tāmen liǎ de guānxi fēicháng hǎo.
samples.en: They have a very good relationship.

samples.pinyin: tā hé lǎobǎn de guānxi hěn hǎo.

samples.pinyin: tā gěi wǒ mǎile yīxiē shǔ tiáo.

samples.pinyin: Tā zài tái shàng zuò fǎ zhì bìng.

samples.pinyin: Wénzhāng zuòfǎ

samples.pinyin: guō lǐ zhèng zhēngzhe bāozǐ.

samples.pinyin: māma zài zhēng yú.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan yǒujī shūcài.
samples.en: I like organic vegetables.

samples.pinyin: yǒujī shípǐn gèng jiànkāng.
samples.en: Organic food is healthier.

samples.pinyin: zhè jiā diàn yǒu xīnxiān shípǐn.
samples.en: This store has fresh food.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xuǎnzé jiànkāng de shípǐn.
samples.en: I choose healthy food.

samples.pinyin: dìqiú wéiràozhe tàiyáng gōngzhuàn.
samples.en: The earth goes around the sun.

samples.sentence: 人們曾經認為地球是平的。
samples.pinyin: rénmen céngjīng rènwéi dìqiú shì píng de.
samples.en: People used to think the earth was flat.

samples.pinyin: gōngchǎng wūrǎnle héliú.
samples.en: The factory polluted the river.

samples.pinyin: qìchē páifàng wūrǎn kōngqì.
samples.en: Car emissions pollute the air.

samples.pinyin: tā fànle yánzhòng de cuòwù.
samples.en: He made a serious mistake.

samples.pinyin: tā de bìngqíng fēicháng yánzhòng.
samples.en: His sickness is rather critical.
samples.vi: Bệnh anh ấy rất nghiêm trọng.

samples.pinyin: zhè jiā fànguǎn bù tài wèishēng.
samples.en: This restaurant is not very hygienic.

samples.sentence: 這裡/裏的衛生條件很差。
samples.pinyin: zhèlǐ de wèishēng tiáojiàn hěn chà.
samples.en: The sanitary conditions here are very poor.

samples.sentence: 這種水果含有豐富的營養。
samples.pinyin: zhè zhǒng shuǐguǒ hányǒu fēngfù de yíngyǎng.
samples.en: This fruit is a nutritional powerhouse.

samples.sentence: 我們需要吃/喫有營養的食物。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào chī yǒu yíngyǎng de shíwù.
samples.en: We need to eat nutritious foods.

items.vi: vân vân / các thứ tương tự

samples.meaning: and so on; and so forth; and the like; and others; and what not
samples.sentence: 他就喜歡看文藝作品什麼的。
samples.pinyin: tā jiù xǐhuān kàn wényì zuòpǐn shénme de.
samples.en: His interests lie in literary works and the like.
samples.vi: Anh ấy thích xem tác phẩm văn nghệ chẳng hạn.

samples.meaning: and so on; and so forth; and the like; and others; and what not
samples.sentence: 他們店賣點心，小吃/喫什麼的。
samples.pinyin: tāmen diàn mài diǎnxīn, xiǎo chī shénme de.
samples.en: They sell snacks, desserts, and other kinds of food.
samples.vi: Tiệm họ có bán điểm tâm, đồ ăn vặt vân vân.

items.en: to grill, to roast, to BBQ

samples.pinyin: wǒ māma xǐhuān kǎoròu.
samples.en: My mom loves barbecue.
samples.vi: Mẹ tôi thích nướng thịt.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān chī liàng shān kǎoyā.
samples.en: I like to eat Lang Son roast duck.
samples.vi: Tớ thích ăn vịt quay Lạng Sơn.

samples.pinyin: nǐ xiǎng yào jiādiǎn shālā ma?
samples.en: Would you like some salad?
samples.vi: Bạn có muốn thêm chút salad không?

samples.pinyin: shālā xūyào xīnxiān de shūcài.
samples.en: Salads need fresh vegetables.
samples.vi: Món salad cần rau củ tươi.

samples.sentence: 小孩子喜歡吃/喫麥當勞。
samples.pinyin: xiǎo háizi xǐhuān chī màidāngláo.
samples.en: Children like to eat McDonald's.
samples.vi: Trẻ con rất thích ăn McDonald's.

samples.sentence: 麥當勞的食物非常好吃/喫。
samples.pinyin: màidāngláo de shíwù fēicháng hǎo chī.
samples.en: McDonald's food is very delicious.
samples.vi: Thức ăn của McDonald's rất ngon.

samples.sentence: 我們學校旁邊有速食店。
samples.pinyin: wǒ men xué xiào páng biān yǒu sù shí diàn
samples.en: There is a fast-food restaurant next to our school.

samples.sentence: 我們在路口看見速食店。
samples.pinyin: Wǒ men zài lù kǒu kàn jiàn sù shí diàn.
samples.en: We saw a fast-food shop at the intersection.
